regressions.reasoning: Stage_02's oracle self-derives the live NodePort each run and now gets connection-refused (not a cert error), meaning the shared ingress-nginx-controller itself is unreachable/down. None of the later stages (canary routing, rate limiting, OTel tracing) were meant to touch demo.example.com's TLS or take down the controller — this looks like the agent's stage_04/stage_05 edits to the shared controller ConfigMap/Deployment broke the controller for all hosts, a real collateral regression rather than an intended state change.
